name: filing_date
label: Filing Date
hint: Select the date of petition filing

name: court_name
label: Court Name
hint: Enter full name of the court (e.g., District Court)

name: court_location
label: Court Location
hint: Enter city and state of the court

name: adoptive_parent1_name
label: Adoptive Parent 1 Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: adoptive_parent1_age
label: Adoptive Parent 1 Age
hint: Enter age in years

name: adoptive_parent1_address
label: Adoptive Parent 1 Address
hint: Enter full residential address

name: marital_status
label: Marital Status of Adoptive Parents
hint: Select marital status

name: adoptive_parent2_name
label: Adoptive Parent 2 Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: adoptive_parent2_age
label: Adoptive Parent 2 Age
hint: Enter age in years

name: adoptive_parent2_address
label: Adoptive Parent 2 Address
hint: Enter full residential address

name: relationship_to_child
label: Relationship to Child
hint: Select the petitioner's relationship to the child

name: relationship_to_child_other
label: Other Relationship to Child
hint: Enter other relationship to the child

name: child_name
label: Child Name
hint: Enter child's full name

name: identified_child
label: Identified Child
hint: Tick if the child is already born and specifically identified

name: child_gender
label: Child Gender
hint: Select gender

name: child_dob
label: Child Date of Birth
hint: Select date of birth

name: child_place_of_birth
label: Place of Birth
hint: Enter place of birth

name: agency_or_guardian_details
label: Agency / Guardian Details
hint: Enter details of adoption agency or legal guardian

name: known_lineage
label: Known Biological Lineage
hint: Tick if the biological parent or relinquishing guardian is known

name: biological_parent_details
label: Biological Parent Details
hint: Enter details of biological parents or relatives relinquishing rights

name: consent_details
label: Consent Details
hint: Provide consent details from biological parents or legal guardian

name: reason_for_adoption
label: Reason for Adoption
hint: State reason for adoption

name: financial_status
label: Financial Status of Adoptive Parents
hint: Describe employment, income, and ability to support the child

name: home_study_completed
label: Home Study Completed
hint: Tick if a home study or social worker assessment has been completed

name: home_study_details
label: Home Study Details
hint: Enter agency, date, and approval details of the home study

name: has_other_children
label: Other Children in Household
hint: Tick if there are existing children in the adoptive household

name: declaration
label: Declaration
hint: Enter declaration confirming willingness and responsibility
